solutions.solution: (d) All lions are wild animals but cow is entirely different. This can be expressed as given in option (d). [Venn diagram shows wild animals as large circle containing lions as smaller circle, with cow as separate circle outside]

(d) Lucknow is a city of India while USA is entirely a different country. This can be expressed as given in option (d). [Venn diagram shows India as large circle containing Lucknow as smaller circle, with USA as separate circle outside]

(c) Brinjal is a vegetable while fruit is entirely different. This can be expressed as given in option (c). [Venn diagram shows vegetable as large circle with brinjal inside, and fruit as separate circle outside]

(e) Door and window are entirely different but both are the parts of a house. This can be expressed as given in option (e). [Venn diagram shows house as large circle containing two separate circles for door and window]

(d) Some honest people may be intelligent. Some honest people may be poor. Some intelligent people may be poor. Some poor honest people may be intelligent. This can be expressed as given in option (a). [Venn diagram shows three overlapping circles for Honest, Poor, and Intelligent]

(c) All cars are automobile but train is entirely different from both of them. This can be expressed as given in option (c). [Venn diagram shows automobile as large circle containing car as smaller circle, with train as separate circle outside]

(c) We know that both tiger and elephant are animals. This relationship can be expressed as given as in option (c). [Venn diagram shows animal as large circle containing two separate circles for elephant and tiger]

(b) Some women are teachers. Some women are doctors. Some doctors are teachers. Some women doctors are also teachers. This can be expressed as given in option (b). [Venn diagram shows three overlapping circles for Women, Teachers, and Doctors]

(c) Rivers and canals both are perennial sources of water and hence, both are included in it. This can be expressed by the following diagram. [Venn diagram shows perennial sources of water as large circle containing two separate circles for canals and rivers]

(c) Ring is a type of ornament and diamond ring is a variety of ring. This can be expressed as given in option (a). [Venn diagram shows ornament as outer circle, ring as middle circle, and diamond ring as innermost circle]

(d) This can be expressed as given in option (d). Here, small circle represents wives who work because wives who work are a part of married persons as well as women. [Venn diagram shows wives who work, married persons, and women with specific overlapping arrangement]
